channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Agentic World Modeling: Foundations, Capabilities, Laws, and Beyond
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI — As AI systems move from generating text to accomplishing goals through sustained interaction, the ability to model environment dynamics becomes a central bottleneck. Agents that manipulate objects, navigate software, coordinate with others, or design experiments require predictive environment mod...

item.title: FlowAnchor: Stabilizing the Editing Signal for Inversion-Free Video Editing
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — We propose FlowAnchor, a training-free framework for stable and efficient inversion-free, flow-based video editing. Inversion-free editing methods have recently shown impressive efficiency and structure preservation in images by directly steering the sampling trajectory with an editing signal. Ho...

item.title: Learning Evidence Highlighting for Frozen LLMs
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Large Language Models (LLMs) can reason well, yet often miss decisive evidence when it is buried in long, noisy contexts. We introduce HiLight, an Evidence Emphasis framework that decouples evidence selection from reasoning for frozen LLM solvers. HiLight avoids compressing or rewriting the input...

item.title: AgentSearchBench: A Benchmark for AI Agent Search in the Wild
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI, cs.IR — The rapid growth of AI agent ecosystems is transforming how complex tasks are delegated and executed, creating a new challenge of identifying suitable agents for a given task. Unlike traditional tools, agent capabilities are often compositional and execution-dependent, making them difficult to as...

item.title: dWorldEval: Scalable Robotic Policy Evaluation via Discrete Diffusion World Model
item.description: 📄 New in cs.RO — Evaluating robotics policies across thousands of environments and thousands of tasks is infeasible with existing approaches. This motivates the need for a new methodology for scalable robotics policy evaluation. In this paper, we propose dWorldEval, which uses a discrete diffusion world model as ...

item.title: There Will Be a Scientific Theory of Deep Learning
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (159 comments) — In this paper, we make the case that a scientific theory of deep learning is emerging. By this we mean a theory which characterizes important properties and statistics of the training process, hidden representations, final weights, and performance of neural networks. We pull together major strand...

item.title: Spend Less, Fit Better: Budget-Efficient Scaling Law Fitting via Active Experiment Selection
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG — Scaling laws are used to plan multi-million-dollar training runs, but fitting those laws can itself cost millions. In modern large-scale workflows, assembling a sufficiently informative set of pilot experiments is already a major budget-allocation problem rather than a routine preprocessing step....

item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (143 comments) · ⭐ 31 stars today on GitHub — Stable Diffusion web UI

item.title: google / langextract
item.description: ⭐ 70 stars today on GitHub · ⭐ 35.9k total stars — A Python library for extracting structured information from unstructured text using LLMs with precise source grounding and interactive visualization.

item.title: rasbt / LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: ⭐ 81 stars today on GitHub · ⭐ 91.6k total stars — Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: landing laPrompt to App — How It Actually Works in 2026

item.title: ZhuLinsen / daily_stock_analysis
item.description: ⭐ 177 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 31.8k total stars — LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

item.title: zilliztech / memsearch
item.description: ⭐ 48 stars today on GitHub — One persistent memory layer for all your AI agents, backed by Markdown and Milvus.
